productDisplayName: Timberland Women Belle Isld Boat Ball Black Floater
description: These Belle Island Ballerina shoes from timberland are great for casual wear. The feminine design incorporates premium environmentally friendly materials and wearer friendly features to give you greater comfort and grip. Team this with dainty dresses or capris and tees for a great casual look.Upper Slip-on style for easy removal and insertion of the feet Premium leather upper for long-lasting wear 100% recycled PET lining for climate control and breathability    Midsole Leather-covered EVA cushioned midsole and footbed for optimal comfort Outsole Green Rubber& trade siped outsole is made from 42% recycled rubber for slip resistance and maximum traction Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
